items.title: Ep 55 – The Python Show Podcast – The Python Documentary with Paul Everitt
items.author: Mike
items.content:
In this episode, we have special guest Paul Everitt on the show to  last week. Paul is the head of developer advocacy at JetBrains and a “Python oldster”.

We chat about Python – the documentary, Paul’s start in programming as well as with Python, and much, much more!
